title: XML External Entity (XXE) Injection Attack on File Upload

steps.message: Block the source IP associated with the detected XXE payload: <!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM 'file:///etc/hostname'>
Search Splunk logs for all XML upload attempts containing 'SYSTEM' or 'PUBLIC' entity keywords from the last 24 hours.

Implement code-level mitigation by disabling DTD (Document Type Definitions) and External Entity processing in the application's XML parser. Reference WAHH Chapter 13 regarding input validation routine logic flaws.
Verify the effectiveness of the code patch and the integrity of the /etc/hostname file on the affected server.
Executive review of the data breach risk assessment. XXE attempted to access system-level files (/etc/hostname).
